name: confluent_platform
explanation: Confluent Platform is a JMX integration (`is_jmx: true`, `template: instances/jmx`) that connects via the Java RMI registry to brokers, Connect, Schema Registry, REST Proxy, etc. JMX in production Confluent deployments is gated behind RMI credentials and frequently SSL (trust/key stores). Even when unauthenticated locally, JMX requires per-component port configuration, no canonical default port, and one instance per component. The check has no auto_conf.yaml because Autodiscovery cannot template JMX targets reliably without operator input. Per the procedure shortcut, JMX-fetch integrations are always impossible to auto-configure.
notes: The integration is multi-component: each JMX component runs on a different port (broker 9999, Connect 9875, Schema Registry 9987, etc.) which the user must declare. Discovery would also need to know which Confluent component is on which JVM.
